scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,ares -c cyan,magenta "cd artifacts/api-server && PORT=10001 npm run dev" "cd artifacts/ares && VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:10001 npm run dev"
scripts.dev:setup: npm install && cd artifacts/api-server && npm install && cd ../ares && npm install
scripts.dev:api: cd artifacts/api-server && PORT=10001 npm run dev
scripts.dev:ares: cd artifacts/ares && VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:10001 npm run dev
